zh.lifeSummary: 當Isota Josea Ashe於大約1498年出生在英國英格蘭戴文洛利時，她的父親William Ashe55歲，母親Rosiana Pitkin13歲。她於1516年與William Tucker在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1543年在她的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文洛利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isota Josea Ashe于大约1498年出生在英国英格兰戴文洛利时，她的父亲William Ashe55岁，母亲Rosiana Pitkin13岁。她于1516年与William Tucker在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1543年在她的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文洛利。

nameMeanings.name: Ashe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Ash   1, found mainly in Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , a variant of   Ash   2.

History: This is the name of a prominent NC family; John Baptist Ashe settled in NC before 1720. It is not known where he came from: his personal name suggests that he may have been of French extraction, perhaps originally named Jean-Baptiste Dufresne.

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Isota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Anello, Angelo, Carlo, Carmine, Duilio, Gino, Lido, Palma, Santina, Ugo.
Italian: topographic name for someone who lived on an island,isola.

nameMeanings.name: Josea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

variants.name: Joseph
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Isota Josea Ashe was born about 1498, in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Ashe, was 55 and her mother, Rosiana Pitkin, was 13. She married William Tucker in 1516, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1543, in her hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isota Josea Ashe est née environ 1498, à Throwleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ashe, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Rosiana Pitkin, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé William Tucker en 1516, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1543, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Throwleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isota Josea Ashe um 1498 in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ashe 55 und ihre Mutter Rosiana Pitkin 13. Sie hat 1516 in Devon, England William Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1543 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isota Josea Ashe è nata il circa 1498 nel Throwleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Ashe, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Rosiana Pitkin, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato William Tucker nel 1516, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1543, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Throwleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isota Josea Asheが約1498年にイギリスイギリスデボンスロウレイグで生まれた時，父William Asheは55歳，母Rosiana Pitkinは13歳であった。1516年にイギリスデボンでWilliam Tuckerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1543年に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンスロウレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isota Josea Ashe(이)가 대략 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스로우리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ashe(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosiana Pitkin(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 데폰에서 William Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스로우리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isota Josea Ashe nasceu aproximadamente 1498, em Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ashe, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Rosiana Pitkin, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com William Tucker em 1516, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1543, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isota Josea Ashe родилась около 1498 г. в местности троулиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Ashe было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosiana Pitkin, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tucker в 1516 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1543 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности троулиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isota Josea Ashe nació aproximadamente 1498, en Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ashe, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Rosiana Pitkin, tenía 13 años. Se casó con William Tucker en 1516, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1543, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
